ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the merchant who is fulfilling the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., placed, processing, shipped, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address associated with the order */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "customer_notes" TEXT /* Notes or special instructions from the customer */,
  "merchant_notes" TEXT /* Notes or special instructions from the merchant */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax applied to the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied to the order */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used for the order */,
  "shipping_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping method used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_method_id") REFERENCES shipping_methods ("shipping_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_merchant_id FOREIGN KEY ("merchant_id") REFERENCES merchants ("merchant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES shipping_addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last login */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON column to store customer preferences (e.g., email preferences, notification preferences) */,
  "referrer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who referred this customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merchants" (
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merchant */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the merchant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the merchant */,
  "business_address" TEXT /* Business address of the merchant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the merchant registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the merchant's last login */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the merchant's website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON column to store links to the merchant's social media profiles */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the merchant */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the merchant has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merchant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in an order */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the items in the order */,
  "discounted_price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit after any discounts */,
  "tax_per_unit" REAL /* Tax amount per unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* JSON column to store the dimensions of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand the product belongs to */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the product has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the payment method logo */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the payment method is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the address (optional) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the address */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the address is the default shipping address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., home, work) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_changes" (
  "status_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the order */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was changed */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who changed the status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_changes_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's website */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_methods" (
  "shipping_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping method */,
  "shipping_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping method */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the shipping method */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the shipping method is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_method_id")
)
